mnemonics.title: McCall's Quality Factors
mnemonics.content: OPERATION: Correct, Reliable, Efficient (CRE) REVISION: Maintain, Flexible (MF) TRANSITION: Portable (P) → CREMF-P

acronyms.usage: Process improvement framework with 5 maturity levels

visualTips.visualization: Imagine control flow as subway map - complexity = number of route choices +1

analogies.analogy: Like regular health checkups vs treatment (QC) - prevention vs cure
